reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 저희 강아지가 맘에 들어하네요.^^
reviews.content_en: Our puppy loves it. ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
진짜 귀여워요ㅎㅎ
댕댕이주기 아까울정도로ㅋㅋㅋ
디테일함 짱!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute haha 😄 I'm even hesitant to give it to my pup lol The details are amazing!

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 우리 애기가 좋아하는 삑삑이 장난감😊 어떤 장난감이든 며칠만에 부숴버리는 괴력 애기예요! 이번에두 얼마 못 가겠거니 미리 체념(?)하고 주문했는데 웬걸?! 생각보다 너무 잘 버텨주고 있는 핏짜🍕 친구예요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 바스락+삑삑이 장난감을 제일 좋아하는 애기한테 딱❤️
reviews.content_en: My baby's favorite squeaky toy 😊 This pup has crazy destructive power and destroys any toy within days! I was already resigned to it not lasting long before ordering, but guess what?! Our Pizza buddy is holding up way better than expected 🍕 Perfect for my baby who loves crinkle + squeaky toys the most ❤️

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
바스락 소리를 엄청 좋아해서 주문 했어요 
살짝만 건들여도 버스락 거려서 엄청 잘 갖고 노네요 
딴짓 할 때 유인용으로 쓰기도 좋습니당
reviews.content_en: My pup loves the crinkling sound so much that I ordered it. Even the slightest touch makes it crinkle, so he plays with it all the time. It's also great for distracting him when I need him occupied!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
🍕종합 의견
배송,디자인,견고함,선호성 모든면에서 만족합니다! 다른 제품도 사줘야겠다는 생각이 들었어요 ㅎㅎ 만족도X1000000입니다. 
🍕배송
배송 겁나 빨라요! 애기가 자꾸 물티슈 같은 바스락 거리는 재질만 보면 환장을 해서 사줘야겠다는 생각을 하고 시켰는데 그다음날 바로 왔어요 ! 
🍕디자인 
보시다시피 핏짜 디자인 너무 귀여워요🐾🐶포장까지 꼼꼼했고 사은품으로 주신 북어 간식도 잘 먹이겠습니다 ㅎㅎ 그리고 내구성이 좋아보여요. 타 제품들 보면 금방 실밥 터지고 망가지던데 지금 일주일 정도 사용했는데 아가가 맘껏 가지고 놀아도 처음 모습 그대로입니다 ㅎㅎ 
🍕선호성
강아지 장난감이다보니 디자인도 물론 중요하지만 아이들이 좋아하는지가 젤 중요한 것 같아요 아무리 비싸고 좋다는거 사줘도 안쓰면 그만이니,, 바잇미 피자 장난감은 바스락+삑삑이 같이 되어있어 집중력 없는 아가도 잘 가지고 놀더라구요 ! 크기도 적당한 것 같아요! 
🍕세탁,냄새 
장난감 사보면 냄새나는 경우 많던데 바잇미 피자 장난감은 전혀 그런게 없었어요 ! 항상 세탁하고 아가한테 줬는데 피자는 너무 처음부터 좋아해서 세탁하고 줄 수가 없었어요ㅎ 아가가 잘때 세탁했는데 전혀 망가짐 없이 세탁도 잘 되네용!
reviews.content_en:
🍕 Overall Opinion
I'm satisfied with everything - shipping, design, durability, and my pup's preference! I'm already thinking about buying other products haha My satisfaction level is X1000000.
🍕 Shipping
The shipping is insanely fast! My pup goes crazy for crinkly materials like wet wipes, so I ordered thinking she really needs this, and it arrived the very next day!
🍕 Design
As you can see, the Pizza design is so cute 🐾🐶 The packaging was meticulous, and I'll definitely give her the dried pollack treats that came as a bonus haha The durability looks great too. With other products, threads come loose and they break quickly, but I've been using this for about a week and it still looks brand new even though my pup plays with it constantly haha
🍕 Preference
Since it's a dog toy, design is important, but whether the pup actually likes it is the most important thing. No matter how expensive or good something is, if they don't use it, that's that. The BITE ME Pizza toy has both crinkle and squeak sounds, so even my pup with short attention span loves playing with it! The size seems just right too!
🍕 Washing & Smell
A lot of toys smell when you buy them, but the BITE ME Pizza toy had no smell at all! I usually wash toys before giving them to my pup, but she loved the pizza so much from the start that I couldn't even wash it first haha I washed it while she was sleeping and it washed perfectly without any damage at all!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 장난감 주면 몇분 만에 실 나오고 몇칠 못 가서 솜나오고 해서 매번 사고 버리고를 반복해서 장난감 고르는데 엄청 신중한데 튼튼해보이고 귀여워서 전부터 제가 다갖고 싶었는데 삑삑이랑 바스락거려서 환장하면서 잘 가지고 놀아요 항상 상표에 집착해서 매번 뜯어서 달랑거려서 애초에 잘라 줬는데 자른 부분에 실이 조금씩 나와요 이가 튼튼해서 다 뜯어 놓고 먹기 바빠해서 매번 마음졸이며 갖고 놀때마다 쳐다보기 바쁜데 이 장난감도 너무 잘 뜯어서 뜯어 먹을까봐 잠깐 가지고 놀게 하고 뺏어서 아쉬워요 장난감 오래 갖고 놀아도 잘 안 터지는 반려견이라면 만족하실것 같아요
reviews.content_en: Every time I give my pup a toy, threads come out in minutes and it falls apart in a few days, so I'm always very careful when choosing toys. This one looked durable and cute, and I've wanted everything from this brand, so when I saw it had a squeaker and crinkle sound, my pup went crazy for it and plays with it well. My pup is obsessed with tags and always tears them off and shakes them around, so I cut them off from the start, but a few threads are coming out from the cut part. Since my pup has strong teeth and tears everything apart and eats it, I'm always worried and constantly watching. This toy is also being torn apart, so I'm worried she might try to eat it, and I can only let her play with it briefly before taking it away - I wish she could play with it longer. If you have a dog that doesn't tear apart toys easily even with long playtime, I think you'd be satisfied with this!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
3개월령(남아) 아이가 잘 가지고 놀고 있어요.
바스락 소리 / 삑삑소리 2종이라 가지고 노는 재미가 있네요. 

잘 가지고 놀아 사준 보람이 있어요. 

증정으로 간식까지 주고 아주 좋아요!
reviews.content_en:
My 3-month-old boy plays with it well.
It has 2 types of sounds - crinkle and squeak - so there's fun in playing with it.
It's rewarding to see him play with it so well.
It even comes with treats as a bonus gift - very nice!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락 소리가 나는 장난감이라서 코코가 너무 좋아해요!
포장도 너무 귀엽게 와서 저도 너무 만족한 제품이에요😊
가격도 착하고 제품도 착해서 정말 강추입니다‼️
reviews.content_en:
Coco loves this toy because it makes a crinkling sound!
The packaging is so cute too, so I'm very satisfied with this product 😊
The price is good and the quality is good too, so I really recommend it! ‼️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 피자 장난감 퀄리티 대만족입니다! 바스락 거리는 소리만 있는 줄 알았는데 삑삑이도 같이 내장되어 있고 포장박스도 사진처럼 피자박스에 담겨와서 너무 귀여웠어요!! 강아지도 엄청 좋아해요!!!
reviews.content_en: I'm very satisfied with the quality of the Pizza toy! I thought it only made a crinkle sound, but it also has a built-in squeaker, and the packaging box came in a cute pizza box just like in the pictures!! My dog loves it so much!!!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
저희집 냥이 애착 인형입니다
어릴때 동물병원에 접종하러 갔다가 귀여워서 구매 해서 1년넘게 엄청 잘 가지고 놀았어요
물어오고 그루밍도 엄청하고 뒷발로 팡팡 차기도 해서 많이 너덜너덜 해져서 바잇미에서 새 상품 또 구매했어요 
바스락거리는 소리랑 안에 삑삑이 소리도 나고 최애인형입니다
reviews.content_en: This is my cat's favorite attachment toy. When she was young, we went to the vet for vaccinations, thought it was cute and bought it, and she's been playing with it very well for over a year. She carries it around, grooms it a lot, and kicks it with her back legs, so it got pretty worn out. I bought a new one from BITE ME again. It makes a crinkle sound and has a squeaker inside too - it's her favorite toy.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
넘넘 귀여워요 ㅠ 최고존귀 ㅠㅠ
애기가 이 장난감 좋아해요 ㅋㅋ
피자 먹는 모양이라 저도 넘 귀엽고 조아용 ㅎㅍ
reviews.content_en: So cute!! 😭 Absolutely adorable 😭😭 My pup loves this toy ㅋㅋ The way it looks like eating pizza is so cute and I love it too ㅎㅍ

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 보기에도 맛있어보이는 장난감이에요ㅎㅎㅎ 바스락 장난감 최고!! 선물용으로 하나더 재구매예정입니다
reviews.content_en: It's a toy that looks delicious just looking at it ㅎㅎㅎ Crinkly toys are the best!! Planning to repurchase one more as a gift

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
여기서 산 장난감 중에 포장이 제일 재밌었던 장난감이에요! 저 희 집 강아지 장난감 뜯는데 제가 더 신난 느낌이네요ㅎㅎ 입 크기에 비해서 장난감이 좀 크긴 한데 그래도 잘 가지고 놀고 있어요
삑삑이랑 바스락 같이 있으니까 더 좋아하긴 하는데 삑삑이를 꺼내보려고 안달이 났어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

+) 가지고 논지 하루도 안돼서 벌써 찢어졌어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en:
Out of all the toys I've bought here, this one had the most fun packaging! I got more excited unboxing the toy than my dog did ㅎㅎ The toy is a bit big compared to my dog's mouth size, but he still plays with it well. He loves it even more because it has both a squeaker and crinkly material, but he's so eager to try to pull out the squeaker ㅋㅋㅋㅋ

+) It tore less than a day after playing with it ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운 페페로니 피자에요.
피자라고 이름 알려주니 금방 익혀서
피자가져와 하면 딱 물고오네요^.^
우리 강아지랑 뭔가 잘어울리는 피자에요 ㅋㅋ

피자박스는 필요없는데 귀여워서 박스도 못버리겠어요 ㅋㅋ
일단 보관 ㅋㅋ

요즘 최애 장난감 되었네요 ㅋ
역시 애들은 새거를 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
Such a cute pepperoni pizza toy. Once I told her the name was pizza, she caught on real quick, and now when I say "get the pizza" she grabs it right away^.^ It just suits our dog perfectly ㅋㅋ

I don't really need the pizza box, but it's so cute I can't bring myself to throw it away ㅋㅋ Keeping it for now ㅋㅋ

It's become her favorite toy lately ㅋ Kids really do love new stuff ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
제가 평소 피자를 참 좋아하는데 장난감이 너무 예쁘게 생겨서 바로 사버렸어요 저희 집 댕댕님 형제들 선물도 하려고 ㅎㅎ

달곰이는 기본적으로 장난감을 주면 한시간만에 다 찢어놓거든요 근데 요놈은 바느질이 아주 꼼꼼하게 탄탄하게 만들어졌는지 꽤 오래 가지고 놀았어요 아직 엣지부분은 멀쩡하답니다 🤣
reviews.content_en: I really love pizza, and the toy looked so pretty that I bought it right away. I'm also planning to get it as a gift for my doggy's siblings ㅎㅎ Dalcomi usually destroys any toy in an hour, but this one is sewn together so carefully and sturdily that she's been playing with it for quite a while. The edges are still in perfect condition 🤣

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 포장상자도 귀여움. 적당히 폭신하고 바스락 거려서 좋음. 대각선으로 던지면 공보다 잘 날아감 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The packaging box is cute too. It's nicely squishy and crinkly, which is great. If you throw it diagonally it flies better than a ball ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 장난감이 너무 귀엽네여ㅎㅎ 솜도 넉넉하게 들어가 있어서 폭신폭신한 느낌?
reviews.content_en: The toy is so cute ㅎㅎ There's plenty of stuffing inside so it feels really fluffy and soft?

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 이름이 피자라ㅎㅎㅎ피자랑 관련있는건 모든 사주는데 피자 장난감이 있어서 바로 구매했어요!! 포장도 너무 기엽게 와서ㅜ완전 만족스럽습니다!!
reviews.content_en: The name is pizza ㅎㅎㅎ I buy everything pizza-related, so when I saw there was a pizza toy I bought it right away!! The packaging came so cute too ㅜ I'm completely satisfied!!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 장난감들이 다 특성이 있고 개성넘쳐서 좋아요. 저희 강아지가 너무 좋아하고 잘 물어뜯고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: All the toys have their own characteristics and personality which is great. My dog loves them so much and loves to chew and play with them.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 피자박스 패키지가 너무 귀여워요 애기가 엄청 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: The pizza box packaging is so cute!! My pup absolutely loves it

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 박스부터 디테일 미쳤어요. 넘 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: Even the box is amazing with the details. It's so cute!

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content: 너무너무 좋아하는 장난감이에요. 진드기 알러지가 있어서 안 주다가 너무 좋아해서 블프때 두 개 구매했어요. 집에 있던게 튿어져서 꼬매고 있었어서 두 개 구매했는데 벌써 새거 하나가 앞 부분이 튿어졌어요 ㅎㅎ. 앞 부분만 물고 뜯고해서 잘 튿어지네요^^;;;
reviews.content_en: My pup absolutely loves this toy! She has a dust mite allergy so I hadn't given it to her, but she loves it so much that I bought two during the Black Friday sale. The one we had at home was getting torn up so I was sewing it, and already one of the new ones is getting ripped on the front lol. She just bites and tears at the front part, so it wears pretty easily^^;;;

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 멍멍이 친구 선물로 구매했는데 포장부터 정말정말정말 귀여워요. 멍멍이가 좋아했으면 좋겠네요!
reviews.content_en: Bought this as a gift for my pup, and the packaging is absolutely adorable! I hope my doggy loves it!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
이 펫페로니 피자는 제 취향이 더 많이 들어가있어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 바스락 거리고 삑삑 소리도 나고 넘 긔여워요!
저희집 아가멈머가 잘 가지고 놀아주니 주인엄마는
더 신이 납니다
reviews.content_en: This PEPPERONI PIZZA toy is more to my taste lol It crinkles and makes squeaking sounds and it's so cute! Since our baby's mom plays with it so well, this doggy mom is having a blast too

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
아니 이거 너무 귀엽고 좋아요 
바스락 소리가 잘나서 강아지가 엄청 좋아해요 🐶❤️ 
거기다가 넘 귀엽게 생겨서 사진 찍을때도 핵인싸견처럼 나옴 😎
reviews.content_en:
This is seriously so cute and I love it
The crinkle sound is really good so my pup absolutely loves it 🐶❤️
Plus it's so adorable looking that when I take pictures she looks like a total social media dog 😎

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
피자가 커서 입이 아플 것 같은데..ㅋㅋ
바스락바스락 소리내며 넘 좋아해요~
뺏을까봐 고개 돌리고 쳐다보지도 않네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: The pizza is pretty big so I was worried it might hurt her mouth lol But she loves the crinkly crinkly sounds~ She's so protective of it that she won't even look away when I try to take it from her lololol

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content: 포장부터 귀여운 페퍼로니피자! 바스락이랑 삑삑이 둘 다 들어있어서 강아지가 엄청 좋아해요 ^^
reviews.content_en: Such a cute PEPPERONI PIZZA from the packaging! It has both the crinkle and squeaky sounds so my pup absolutely loves it ^^

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
ㅋㅋㅋ아주 아주 좋아해요
개인적으로는 뽀시락 소리가 더 컸으면 좋겠는데
너무 좋아해서 만족합니다..하루 종일 물고 다녀요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
lol She loves it so so much
Personally I wish the crinkle sound was a bit louder
But she loves it so much that I'm satisfied.. she carries it around all day long lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 피자좋아하는 남편이 생각나서 구매했습니다 ㅋㅋ 강아지는 키우지않지만 케이스며 인형이며 너무 너무 귀엽습니다 추천합니다
reviews.content_en: Bought this because it reminded me of my pizza-loving husband lol I don't actually have a dog, but the case and plushie are absolutely adorable. I recommend it!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여워요! 💛 꺼내니까 댕댕이가 자기꺼라고 
사진 찍는데 가져가려고 해요
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! 💛 When I took it out, my pup claimed it as hers and tried to take it away while I was trying to take a picture

reviews.name: 아****
reviews.content:
포장까지 너무 센스가 있네요 !
저희 집 강아지도 너무 좋아하네용
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so thoughtful! 😊 Our pup absolutely loves it too

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content: 잘 가지고 놀아요.간식도 챙겨주시고 감사합니다
reviews.content_en: He plays with it well. Thank you also for including treats!

reviews.name: p****
reviews.content: 오 생각보다 더 잘가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: Oh, he plays with it way more than I expected!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 넘 귀엽고 강쥐가 좋아해요!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and my pup loves it!

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content:
본가에 댕댕이 선물로 샀어요 ! 삑삑 바스락 소리 잘 납니다
삑삑이는 후기처럼 가운데 작게 있어서 입이 작은 애기들은 소리가 잘 안날거 같아요 ㅠ 매우 귀엽습니다
reviews.content_en: I got this as a gift for my family dog! The squeaking and crunching sounds work great. The squeaker is small in the middle like the reviews mentioned, so smaller dogs might have trouble making the sound come out 😢 It's very adorable though

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애견동반까페에 놀러갔다가 피자장난감에 빠져서 집에 안간다는 아드님 선물로 바로 주문했어요
reviews.content_en: We went to a dog café and my son got so obsessed with the pizza toy that he wouldn't leave! I ordered it right away as a gift for him

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content: 배송 빠르고 도착 하자 마자 중성화수술한 우리 호야한테 줬어요~아파했는데 빨리 와서 정신을 페페로니에 집중해서 좋네요~계속 잘 가지고 놀길 바래봐요^^
reviews.content_en: Super fast shipping! As soon as it arrived, I gave it to our Hoya who just had a spay surgery. She was in pain but got so focused on the pepperoni that she's doing great now~ Hope she keeps playing with it happily ^^

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content: 지인 뭉뭉이가 피자인형을 너무 좋아해서 홍시도 사줬어요 ㅎㅎㅎ 근데 첫날 놀고 잘 안가지고 오네요ㅠㅠㅠ 흐규ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My friend's dog Mungmung loves the pizza toy so much, so I got Hongsi one too haha But on the first day, he played with it and then kind of stopped bringing it around 😭😭😭 Sob 😭😭

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희집 강아지 최애 장난감이예요
원래 쓰던건 다 헤져서 새로 샀어요
reviews.content_en: It's my pup's favorite toy! The original one got all worn out so I bought a new one

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 진짜 피자처럼 포장되어있어서 디테일이 귀여워요ㅎㅎ 바스락, 삑삑 좋아해서 엄청 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's actually packaged like a real pizza so the details are so cute hehe! He loves the crunching and squeaking sounds so he plays with it constantly

reviews.name: 희****
reviews.content:
내새끼 백일잔치를위해 노즈워크 장남감으로
준비했어요 바스락거리고 탐색도하고 잘가지고놀아요^^
reviews.content_en: I got this nose work toy ready for my pup's 100-day celebration! It crinkles and he loves exploring it—plays with it so well ^^

reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content:
어머 너무 좋아해요
바스락을 좋아하는 우리강쥐가 환장
reviews.content_en: Oh, he loves it so much! 😍 My pup is crazy about the crinkling sound 🐶

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 보리 크리스마스 선물 너무 좋아해요!!!!
reviews.content_en: Bori loves his Christmas present so much!!!!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content: 아이가 너무 좋아해서 선물하려고 구마했어요
reviews.content_en: My pup loved it so much, I decided to buy it as a gift too!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 잘갖고놀아서 낡아버려서 두번째구매에요!
reviews.content_en: He played with it so much that it wore out—this is my second purchase!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 우리집 강아지 최애 장난감이에요
reviews.content_en: It's my dog's favorite toy ever! 🐶

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
미용하고 왓더니 택배가 똬악 
박스 뜯자마자 바잇미 장난감 앞으로 출동
reviews.content_en: Came back from grooming and the package arrived! 📦 As soon as we opened the box, my pup went straight for the BITE ME toy 🎉

reviews.name: 추****
reviews.content: 제가 피자를 좋아해서 피자장난감을 구매해봤어요! 강아지가 마음에 들어했으면 좋겠네용
reviews.content_en: I love pizza, so I decided to try out the pizza toy! Hoping my dog loves it too~ 🍕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
바스락 삑삑소리 때문에 혼자 잘가지고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ
장난감들이 다 너무 귀여워요 ~^^
바잇미 !! 또 구매하고싶네요
reviews.content_en: He plays with it all by himself because of the crinkles and squeaky sounds ㅋㅋ The toys are all so cute too! ~^^ I want to buy BITE ME toys again!

reviews.name: w****
reviews.content: 강아지 장난감 바잇미꺼 한번 산 후에는 계속 여기서 만든 제품만 구매하는거 같아요. 한시간도 안되어서 다 터지고 삑삑이는 고장나버리고 그랬는데 바잇미꺼는 오~래 가지고 놀면 살짝 터지긴하지만 삑삑이가 고장 나지 않아서 너무 좋아요! 앞으로도 저희 강아지 장난감은 바잇미껄로 살래요.
reviews.content_en: Ever since I bought a BITE ME dog toy once, I just keep buying their products! Other toys would fall apart in less than an hour and the squeakers would break, but with BITE ME toys, even after playing for a long time, they might get slightly torn but the squeaker still works perfectly—I love it! From now on, I'm only buying BITE ME toys for my pup.
